marks_distribution: Unit 1: Some Basic Concepts of Chemistry - 7 Marks
Unit 3: Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties - 6 Marks
Unit 4: Chemical Bonding and Molecular Structure - 7 Marks
Unit 8: Organic Chemistry: Some basic Principles and Techniques - 11 Marks
question_paper_design: Note on Formative Assessment Topics (s & p Block Elements, The Gaseous State): Assessed only formatively to reinforce understanding without adding to summative assessments.

evaluation_scheme: Project Work (included in practical total): Refer to Project Assessment section for details, though listed as separate item in evaluation scheme context

components_breakdown.note: Listed in evaluation scheme as separate item

project_assessment: Nature of Projects: Scientific investigations involving laboratory testing and collecting information from other sources.
Duration Requirement: Any investigatory project chosen must involve about 10 periods of work with teacher approval.
